scripts.build: npm run setup && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:web && npm run build:nodejs
scripts.build:wasm: cd rust && cargo build --lib --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --target-dir target
scripts.build:web: wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir web rust/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wasm_xlsxwriter.wasm && wasm-opt -O web/wasm_xlsxwriter_bg.wasm -o web/wasm_xlsxwriter_bg.wasm
scripts.build:nodejs: wasm-bindgen --target experimental-nodejs-module --out-dir nodejs rust/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wasm_xlsxwriter.wasm && wasm-opt -O nodejs/wasm_xlsxwriter_bg.wasm -o nodejs/wasm_xlsxwriter_bg.wasm
